log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Siren — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Siren — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Siren — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Siren — Winged Striker HP: 53/67
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Siren — Winged Striker HP: 38/67
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Siren — Winged Striker HP: 20/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Siren — Winged Striker --- HP: 20/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Siren — Winged Striker --- HP: 20/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Siren — Winged Striker --- HP: 20/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 173/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 173/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Siren — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Siren — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Siren — Winged Striker HP: 1/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
══ ROUND 5 ══
--- Siren — Winged Striker --- HP: 1/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (1/67). Going invisible for survival.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Siren — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 173/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Siren — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Siren — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Siren — Winged Striker HP: -13/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
